---
title: "Kiwi Cervantes' Portfolio"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-cervantes/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jkiwi49
---
Kiwi Cervantes is a Graduating Kinesiology student at *California State University, Monterey Bay*. 
They have just gotten into their desired Graduate Program for their M.S. In Kinesiology at *San Francisco State University*.

## Education  

California State Monterey Bay | Marina, CA  
B.S. in Kinesiology | 2023 - 2026

## Experience  

CSUMB Cooperative Learning Center | Anatomy & Physiology Tutor | August 2025 - present
